title: Optimized Mung Bean Nuclease Nanoseq Library Preparation Protocol for Whole Genome Sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ozmmg","text":"Duplex Sequencing (DS) is an ultra-accurate next-generation sequencing method that independently sequences both parent DNA strands, identifying true mutations shared between them and eliminating errors from artifacts or misincorporation. There are multiple duplex sequencing protocols, Nanoseq being one such method (PMID: 33911282). NanoSeq enhances duplex sequencing accuracy by combining BotSeqS (PMID: 27528664) with a restrictive end-repair method using dideoxy nucleotides, overcoming limitations of shallow sequencing and targeted panels for high-sensitivity applications. Here we describe step-by-step, the Nanoseq method using the mung bean nuclease, an enzyme that preferentially cleaves single-stranded DNA while preserving double-stranded DNA. Combining use of this enzyme following mechanical fragmentation of genomic DNA ensures nearly 2x more genome coverage compared to using the HpyCH4V enzyme for genomic DNA fragmentation. This method has been optimized and tested across \u003e15 human tissues, including heart, muscle, colon, blood, cord blood, liver, and brain etc. to generate reproducible results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Prepare 50-100 ng DNA sample into 50 µL TE buffer in PCR plate.
Spin the microTUBE plate and transfer sheared DNA samples into PCR strip tube.
DNA QC on Bioanalyzer2100: optional
Dilute sheared DNA 10X using DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906).
Load 1 µL diluted DNA on Agilent HS DNA kit and QC on Bioanalyzer 2100.
Dilute Mung Bean Nuclease to 0.25 U/μL . %s %s
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times.
Prepare 0.3% SDS Solution. %s %s

Mung bean nuclease reaction. A B 1 Sheared DNA 20 µL 2 Mung bean nuclease buffer (New England Biolabs Catalog # B0250S) 2.8 µL 3 DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906) 5.2 µL 4 diluted Mung bean nuclease (0.25 U/ µL) 2.0 µL
Mix well by pipetting up and down 10 times.
Incubate reaction at 30 °C 00:30:00 on thermocycler.
At the end of incubation, add 1 µL 0.3% SDS immediately and pipetting up and down to mix.
Sample Purification.
Add 60 µL (2X) AMPure XP beads (Beckman Coulter Catalog # A63882) to sample. Pipetting up and down 8 times to mix.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 , then put on magnet stand for 00:05:00 .
Wash beads with 150 µL with 80% Ethanol. Dry beads at Room temperature for 3-5 min.
Elute DNA with 11.5 µL DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906).
Sample QC : Optional.
Dilute MBN treated DNA sample 10X and load 1 µL on High Sensitivity DNA Kit (Agilent Technologies Catalog# 5067-4626).

Prepare T4PNK reaction master mix: A B 1 NEBuffer™ 4 (New England Biolabs Catalog # B7004S) 1.5 µL 2 Adenosine 5'-Triphosphate (ATP) (New England Biolabs Catalog # P0756S) 1.5 µL 3 T4 Polynucleotide Kinase (New England Biolabs Catalog # M0201S) 1.0 µL 4 DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906) 1.0 µL
T4PNK reaction A B 1 MBN-treated DNA 10 µL 2 T4PNK master mix 5 µL
Gently pipetting up and down to mix.
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 on a thermocycler.
Prepare 1 millimolar (mM) equimolar dATP/ddBTPs. %s %s
Mix by gentle vortex.
Prepare A-Tailing reaction mix: %s %s
Mix by gently pipetting up and down 6X.
A-Tailing reaction %s %s
Mix gently by pipetting up and down.
Incubate reaction at 37 °C for 00:30:00 on a thermocycler.
Prepare Ligation master mix. %s %s
Mix gently by pipetting up and down 6 times.
Adapter ligation reaction %s %s
Mix gently by pipetting up and down 6 times.
Incubate reaction at 20 °C for 00:20:00 followed by 4 °C hold on a thermocycler.
Purify sample with 1X ( 37.4 µL ) AMPure XP beads (Beckman Coulter Catalog # A63882) and eluted into 25 µL H 2 O.

Optional : Dilute 1 µL adapter-ligated DNA 5X and load 1 µL library on High Sensitivity DNA Kit (Agilent Technologies Catalog# 5067-4626). If high adapter dimmer was seen on QC, perform a second AMPure XP beads purification.
Prepare qPCR master mix. %s %s
Dilute adapter-ligated DNA 20x by adding 2 µL adapter-ligated DNA to 38 µL DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906).
qPCR reaction setup. %s %s
Mix by pipetting up and down 10X.
Set reactions as triplicates in 384 well plates.
qPCR Standards. %s %s
Set reactions as triplicates in 384 well plates.
Mix by pipetting up and down 10X.
qPCR amplification. Run qPCR reactions on QuantStudio™ 6 Flex Real-Time PCR System (Applied Biosystems™) using the following PCR program: %s %s

Determining the sample concentration. The concentration (nM (fmol/μl)) is determined as follows: mean of sample concentration × dilution factor (20)× 452/573/1,000. where 452 is the size of the standard in bp; 573 is the proxy for the average library size in bp.
Based on qPCR quantification result, dilute 0.1 fmol adapter-ligated DNA in 23.5 µL using DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906).

Set up library amplification mix. A B 1 adapter-ligated DNA (0.1 fmol) 23.5 µL 2 IDT Index primer, xGen™ UDI 10nt Primers (IDT Catalog # 10008052) 1.5 µL 3 NEBNext® Ultra™ II Q5® Master Mix (New England Biolabs Catalog # M0544L) 25 µL Oligonucleotides sequences P7 CAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGAT[i7-NNNNNNNNNN]GTCTCGTGGGCTCGG P5 AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC[i5-NNNNNNNNNN]TCGTCGGCAGCGTC
Library amplification program. %s %s
Library Purification.
Purify amplified library twice with 0.75X AMPure XP beads (Beckman Coulter Catalog # A63882).
Elute library into 20 µL 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl Elution buffer (Invitrogen Catalog# A33566).
Library Quantification and normalization.
QC 1 µL library on DNA 7500 kit (Agilent Technologies Catalog# 5067-1506).
Dilute library to 5 nanomolar (nM) in 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl Elution buffer (Invitrogen Catalog# A33566) for pooling.
Library dilution.
Dilute 5 nanomolar (nM) library 3000X by sequential 100 X and 30X dilutions using Nuclease free water (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Catalog# AM9937).
Prepare qPCR-2 master mix. %s %s
qPCR-2 reaction setup. %s %s
Set reactions as triplicates in 384 well plates.
Mix by pipetting up and down 10X.
qPCR-2 amplification. Carry out qPCR reactions on QuantStudio™ 6 Flex Real-Time PCR System (Applied Biosystems™) using the following PCR program: %s %s
Pool libraries at equimolar concentrations based on qPCR-2 results and sequence libraries on Illumina platform for 30X coverage.
Gently pipette up and down to mix.
Transfer entire sample volume into microTUBE plate (Covaris, 520078), spin plate at 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Shear DNA to about 450-bp on Covaris E220 Focused-ultrasonicator system (Covaris, Inc. Woburn, MA) with the following setting: %s %s
Purify sheared DNA by adding 90 µL (1.8X) AMPure XP beads (Beckman Coulter Catalog # A63882) to tube and pipette up and down 8 times followed by 00:08:00 incubation at Room temperature .
Put sample tube on magnet stand for 00:05:00 .
Elute DNA into 22 µL DEPC-Treated Water (Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog # AM9906).
Remove and discard the supernatant.
Wash beads twice by adding 150 µL 80% ethanol.
Dry beads for 3-5 min at Room temperature .
creator: hchao Chao
